zh.lifeSummary: 當Soeiro Mendes de Sousa於大約1111年出生在葡萄牙時，他的父親Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa"32歲，母親Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel24歲。他和de Souza至少有1個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Soeiro Mendes de Sousa于大约1111年出生在葡萄牙时，他的父亲Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa"32岁，母亲Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel24岁。他和de Souza至少有1个女儿。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Mendes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Pedro, Alberto, Sergio, Armando, Cesar, Domingos, Francisco, Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Amadeu, Armanda, Guilherme, Henrique, Sebastiao, Valentim.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name Mendo, a shortened form of Menendo (see Menendez ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Mendez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.  Portuguese Ligia, Godofredo, Ilidio, Paulo, Serafim.
Galician (Méndez): patronymic from the personal name Mendo (see Mendes , of which this is the Galician equivalent).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Mandes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Armando, Joaquin, Jose Inez, Tomasa.
Altered form of Portuguese   Mendes  .

variants.name: Mendy
meanings: West African (Guinea Bissau, Senegal, and the Gambia): name found among the Manjak people, thought to be a shortened and altered form of Portuguese   Mendes  .
English (Buckinghamshire): variant of Menday, itself a variant of Mundy .

variants.name: Menendez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Ramon, Angel, Jorge, Fernando, Francisco, Rafael, Mario.  Portuguese Marcio.

Spanish (Menéndez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Men(d)endo, a hypercorrected form of the Visigothic personal name Hermenegild, composed of the elements ermen, irmen ‘whole, entire’ + gild ‘tribute’. This personal name was borne by a 6th-century member of the Visigothic royal house, who was converted from Arianism to the Catholic faith and became an enormously popular saint, as a result of which the personal name was very common in Spain in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sousa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Francisco, Mario, Alfredo, Jorge, Ana, Armando, Geraldo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Duarte, Mateus, Paulo, Serafim, Agostinho, Albano, Anabela, Armanda, Braz, Goncalo.

Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of numerous places in Portugal named Sousa. The placename is of pre-Roman origin and unexplained origin. Compare   De Sousa  ,   Sosa  , and   Souza  .

History: John Philip Sousa (1854–1932), the American composer of military music, was born in Washington, DC, the son of a US Marine Corps bandmaster. His father was born in Spain, the son of a Portuguese refugee, and had emigrated to North America in the 1840s.

variants.name: Souza
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Sergio, Marcos, Mario, Carlos, Geraldo, Luiz, Ricardo, Fernando, Claudio, Jaime.  Portuguese Paulo, Joao, Marcio, Henrique, Joaquim, Mateus, Ademir, Altair, Heitor, Manoel, Sebastiao, Terezinha.
Portuguese and Galician: variant of   Sousa  . Compare   De Souza   and   Soza  .

variants.name: Sosa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Guadalupe, Miguel, Jorge, Alberto, Arturo.
Spanish:
Castilianized form of Portuguese and Galician   Sousa  .

variants.name: De Sousa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Mario, Fernando, Luis, Jorge, Cesar, Francisco, Geraldo, Adelino, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Agostinho, Paulo, Vasco, Duarte, Ligia, Manoel, Valentim.

Portuguese: habitational name, with preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of numerous places in Portugal named Sousa (see Sousa ). This name was also taken to Goa and other Portuguese settlements in western India. Compare De Souza and D'Souza .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the surname their families used as Catholics.

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Soeiro Mendes de Sousa was born about 1111, in Portugal, his father, Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa", was 32 and his mother, Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, was 24. He had at least 1 daughter with de Souza. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Soeiro Mendes de Sousa est né environ 1111, à Portugal, son père, Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa", avait 32 ans et sa mère, Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec de Souza. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Soeiro Mendes de Sousa um 1111 in Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa" 32 und seine Mutter Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel 24. Er hatte mit de Souza mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Soeiro Mendes de Sousa è nato il circa 1111 nel Portogallo, il suo padre, Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa", aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con de Souza. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Soeiro Mendes de Sousaが約1111年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa"は32歳，母Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnelは24歳であった。彼はde Souzaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Soeiro Mendes de Sousa(이)가 대략 1111년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa"(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel(은)는 24세였다. 그는 de Souza(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Soeiro Mendes de Sousa nasceu aproximadamente 1111, em Portugal, seu pai, Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa", tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com de Souza. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Soeiro Mendes de Sousa родился около 1111 г. в местности Португалия, его отцу по имени Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa" было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, 24. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от de Souza. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Soeiro Mendes de Sousa nació aproximadamente 1111, en Portugal, su papá, Dom Mendo Viegas de Sousa "8º Senhor da Casa de Sousa", tenía 32 años y su mamá, Dom Teresa Rodriguez Fernández De Marnel, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con de Souza. Murió en su pueblo.
